requirement_topic.en: Unintentional Radiated & Conducted Emissions — FCC Part 15
requirement_topic.zh: 非故意辐射与传导发射限值 — FCC第15部分
requirement_topic.zht: 非故意輻射與傳導發射限值 — FCC第15部分

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters operating as digital devices must comply with FCC Part 15 Subpart B limits for unintentional radiators. Residential installations require Class B limits; commercial/industrial installations may qualify for Class A. Compliance is demonstrated via a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) supported by accredited test reports to ANSI C63.4 (radiated) and ANSI C63.4 or FCC-accepted methods (conducted). No FCC registration or pre-market approval is required, but the SDoC and test data must be retained and made available to the FCC on request.
summary.zh: 并网光伏逆变器作为数字设备须符合FCC第15部分B子部分的非故意辐射体限值。住宅安装须满足B类限值；商业/工业安装可适用A类限值。合规通过供应商合规声明（SDoC）证明，需辅以经认可的测试报告（辐射测试参照ANSI C63.4，传导测试参照FCC认可方法）。无需FCC注册或上市前审批，但SDoC及测试数据须留存并按要求提供给FCC。
summary.zht: 並網光伏逆變器作為數字設備須符合FCC第15部分B子部分的非故意輻射體限值。住宅安裝須滿足B類限值；商業/工業安裝可適用A類限值。合規通過供應商合規聲明（SDoC）證明，需輔以經認可的測試報告（輻射測試參照ANSI C63.4，傳導測試參照FCC認可方法）。無需FCC注冊或上市前審批，但SDoC及測試數據須留存並按要求提供給FCC。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR Part 15, Subpart B (FCC Rules — Unintentional Radiators)
ANSI C63.4 (measurement methods for radiated/conducted emissions)
FCC KDB 784748 (SDoC guidance)

summary.en: Chinese manufacturers typically hold CE EMC test reports to EN 55032 (emissions) and EN 61000-3-2/3-3 (harmonics/flicker), plus GB/T 17799 series test reports. Some also test to GB 4343.1 (household/similar appliance emissions). These EN/GB test reports are NOT directly accepted by the FCC — US requires FCC-framework test reports (ANSI C63.4). For SDoC (the applicable authorization path for PV inverters), the FCC does NOT mandate use of an FCC-recognized accredited testing laboratory; however, the test must meet 47 CFR §2.948 facility requirements and the manufacturer must retain records per §2.938. An accredited lab (A2LA, NVLAP, ANAB, or PJLA) is best practice and may be required by downstream customers. Note: As of September 2025, the FCC has denied recognition of multiple China-government-controlled test labs and is actively restricting use of labs in countries without US MRAs — Chinese manufacturers should use labs in MRA-partner countries or US-based labs.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常持有欧CE EMC测试报告（EN 55032发射、EN 61000-3-2/3-3谐波/闪烁），以及GB/T 17799系列测试报告，部分企业还按GB 4343.1测试。上述EN/GB测试报告不被FCC直接接受 — 美国要求按ANSI C63.4框架出具的测试报告。对于SDoC路径（适用于光伏逆变器），FCC不强制要求使用FCC认可的认可实验室；但测试须满足47 CFR §2.948设施要求，制造商须按§2.938留存测试记录。使用认可实验室（A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA）为最佳实践，下游客户可能亦有此要求。注意：2025年9月FCC已拒绝承认多个中国政府控制实验室，并正在限制在无美国MRA国家的实验室使用——中国制造商应使用MRA合作国或美国境内实验室。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常持有歐CE EMC測試報告（EN 55032發射、EN 61000-3-2/3-3諧波/閃爍），以及GB/T 17799系列測試報告，部分企業還按GB 4343.1測試。上述EN/GB測試報告不被FCC直接接受 — 美國要求按ANSI C63.4框架出具的測試報告。對於SDoC路徑（適用於光伏逆變器），FCC不強制要求使用FCC認可的認可實驗室；但測試須滿足47 CFR §2.948設施要求，製造商須按§2.938留存測試記錄。使用認可實驗室（A2LA、NVLAP、ANAB或PJLA）為最佳實踐，下游客戶可能亦有此要求。注意：2025年9月FCC已拒絕承認多個中國政府控制實驗室，並正在限制在無美國MRA國家的實驗室使用——中國製造商應使用MRA合作國或美國境內實驗室。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799.4 (EMC — generic emission standard, industrial environment)
GB/T 17799.3 (EMC — generic emission standard, residential/light industrial)
EN 55032 / CISPR 32 (multimedia equipment emissions — commonly used in CE scope)

GB 4343.1 (household/similar appliance EMC emissions — not applicable to grid-tied string inverters; applicable only to household appliances per CISPR 14 scope; typically not cited for commercial/industrial PV inverters)

gap.en: Core gap: FCC Part 15 requires US-specific SDoC documentation and test reports conducted under ANSI C63.4. CE EMC reports and GB test data cannot be substituted. Class A vs. Class B classification must be determined per FCC rules (not EN 55032 category), which may require re-classification and re-testing. The SDoC label, user manual FCC notice, and responsible party (US contact) requirements are unique to FCC and have no direct analog in CN certification. On mutual recognition: the FCC has no MRA with China for equipment EMC authorization. As of September 2025, the FCC has revoked recognition of multiple Chinese-government-controlled labs and is actively moving to restrict use of labs in countries without US MRAs — Chinese manufacturers should ensure their EMC tests are performed at labs in APEC TEL MRA or EFTA MRA countries, or in the US.
gap.zh: 核心差距：FCC第15部分要求专门的SDoC文件及按ANSI C63.4完成的测试报告，CE EMC报告与GB测试数据不可替代。A类与B类分类须按FCC规则（而非EN 55032分类）重新判定，可能需要重新分类和测试。SDoC标签、用户手册FCC声明及责任方（美国联系人）要求为FCC特有，在中国认证体系中无直接对应项。关于互认：FCC与中国之间不存在设备EMC授权的MRA。2025年9月FCC已撤销多个中国政府控制实验室的认可，并积极推进限制在无美国MRA国家实验室出具的测试数据——中国制造商应确保EMC测试在APEC TEL MRA或EFTA MRA国家的实验室或美国境内实验室进行。
gap.zht: 核心差距：FCC第15部分要求專門的SDoC文件及按ANSI C63.4完成的測試報告，CE EMC報告與GB測試數據不可替代。A類與B類分類須按FCC規則（而非EN 55032分類）重新判定，可能需要重新分類和測試。SDoC標籤、用戶手冊FCC聲明及責任方（美國聯繫人）要求為FCC特有，在中國認證體系中無直接對應項。關於互認：FCC與中國之間不存在設備EMC授權的MRA。2025年9月FCC已撤銷多個中國政府控制實驗室的認可，並積極推進限制在無美國MRA國家實驗室出具的測試數據——中國製造商應確保EMC測試在APEC TEL MRA或EFTA MRA國家的實驗室或美國境內實驗室進行。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — FCC Part 15 Subpart B applies to all digital devices marketed or imported into the US, including grid-tied PV inverters
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable as export requirement; CN manufacturers certified under GB/T 17799 for domestic market only

source.publisher: FCC / US Government Publishing Office (eCFR Title 47)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap requires action: Chinese PV inverter manufacturers must obtain new FCC-framework EMC test reports (ANSI C63.4) from an FCC-recognized accredited laboratory and prepare a US-format SDoC with a US responsible party. Existing CE or GB EMC reports are not substitutable. This is a mandatory pre-market requirement for US import/sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距，需采取行动：中国光伏逆变器制造商须在FCC认可的认可实验室获取新的FCC框架EMC测试报告（ANSI C63.4），并准备含美国责任方信息的美式SDoC文件。现有CE或GB EMC报告不可替代。这是美国进口/销售的强制性上市前要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距，需採取行動：中國光伏逆變器製造商須在FCC認可的認可實驗室獲取新的FCC框架EMC測試報告（ANSI C63.4），並準備含美國責任方資訊的美式SDoC文件。現有CE或GB EMC報告不可替代。這是美國進口/銷售的強制性上市前要求。

requirement_topic.en: Industrial, Scientific & Medical (ISM) Equipment — FCC Part 18
requirement_topic.zh: 工业、科学和医疗（ISM）设备 — FCC第18部分
requirement_topic.zht: 工業、科學和醫療（ISM）設備 — FCC第18部分

summary.en: FCC Part 18 applies to ISM equipment that intentionally generates and uses RF energy for industrial, scientific, medical, domestic or similar purposes (other than communications). PV inverters with switching frequencies or harmonics falling within ISM frequency bands (e.g., 6.78 MHz, 13.56 MHz, 27.12 MHz, 40.68 MHz) may be subject to Part 18 conducted and radiated emission limits in addition to Part 15. Part 18 sets field-strength limits at specified distances. Compliance path: verification by manufacturer; no FCC registration required for most Part 18 devices. In practice, mainstream grid-tied string inverters switch at 16–200 kHz — fundamental frequencies that are below the lowest designated ISM band (6.78 MHz). Part 18 therefore does not apply to most standard PV inverters unless high-order switching harmonics or an intentional RF-generating subsystem (e.g., a PLC communicator) creates energy within an ISM band. Manufacturers should verify harmonic profiles with an FCC-recognized lab during initial FCC compliance assessment.
summary.zh: FCC第18部分适用于故意产生并使用射频能量用于工业、科学、医疗、家用或类似目的（通信除外）的ISM设备。开关频率或谐波落入ISM频段（如6.78 MHz、13.56 MHz、27.12 MHz、40.68 MHz）的光伏逆变器，除须符合第15部分外，还可能须遵守第18部分的传导和辐射发射限值。第18部分规定了指定距离处的场强限值。合规路径：制造商自行验证；大多数第18部分设备无需FCC注册。实际上，主流并网组串式逆变器开关频率为16–200 kHz，低于最低ISM频段（6.78 MHz），因此大多数标准光伏逆变器通常不适用第18部分，除非高次开关谐波或有意产生射频能量的子系统（如电力线通信模块）在ISM频段产生能量。制造商应在初始FCC合规评估期间，由FCC认可实验室对谐波频谱进行核查。
summary.zht: FCC第18部分適用於故意產生並使用射頻能量用於工業、科學、醫療、家用或類似目的（通訊除外）的ISM設備。開關頻率或諧波落入ISM頻段（如6.78 MHz、13.56 MHz、27.12 MHz、40.68 MHz）的光伏逆變器，除須符合第15部分外，還可能須遵守第18部分的傳導和輻射發射限值。第18部分規定了指定距離處的場強限值。合規路徑：製造商自行驗證；大多數第18部分設備無需FCC注冊。實際上，主流並網組串式逆變器開關頻率為16–200 kHz，低於最低ISM頻段（6.78 MHz），因此大多數標準光伏逆變器通常不適用第18部分，除非高次開關諧波或有意產生射頻能量的子系統（如電力線通訊模組）在ISM頻段產生能量。製造商應在初始FCC合規評估期間，由FCC認可實驗室對諧波頻譜進行核查。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR Part 18 (FCC Rules — Industrial, Scientific, and Medical Equipment)
47 CFR Part 18, Subpart D (emission limits)
47 CFR §18.107 (relationship to Part 15)

summary.en: CN manufacturers typically address ISM-band emissions through GB/T 17799.4 (generic industrial EMC emissions) and, where applicable, GB 4343 series for household/similar appliances. There is no direct CN ISM equipment regulatory category equivalent to FCC Part 18. CE-based compliance may reference EN 55011 (ISM equipment emissions), but this standard and its test reports are not accepted by the FCC. SAMR and MIIT have not issued a China-domestic ISM equipment EMC standard that maps directly to the FCC Part 18 scope; GB/T 17799 series is the closest domestic framework but addresses generic industrial emissions, not intentional ISM RF generation specifically.
summary.zh: 中国制造商通常通过GB/T 17799.4（工业环境通用EMC发射）以及适用时的GB 4343系列（家用及类似设备）来应对ISM频段发射问题。中国无与FCC第18部分直接对应的ISM设备监管类别。CE合规可能引用EN 55011（ISM设备发射），但该标准及其测试报告不被FCC接受。市监总局和工信部均未发布直接对应FCC第18部分范围的专项ISM设备EMC标准；GB/T 17799系列是最接近的国内框架，但涵盖通用工业发射，并非专门针对有意ISM射频产生。
summary.zht: 中國製造商通常通過GB/T 17799.4（工業環境通用EMC發射）以及適用時的GB 4343系列（家用及類似設備）來應對ISM頻段發射問題。中國無與FCC第18部分直接對應的ISM設備監管類別。CE合規可能引用EN 55011（ISM設備發射），但該標準及其測試報告不被FCC接受。市監總局和工信部均未發布直接對應FCC第18部分範圍的專項ISM設備EMC標準；GB/T 17799系列是最接近的國內框架，但涵蓋通用工業發射，並非專門針對有意ISM射頻產生。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799.4 (EMC — generic emission, industrial environment)
EN 55011 / CISPR 11 (ISM equipment emissions — used in CE scope, not FCC-accepted)
GB 4343.1 (household/similar appliance EMC — not applicable to grid-tied industrial string inverters; limited to household appliances per CISPR 14 scope)

gap.en: Applicability gap: Whether a specific PV inverter model falls under Part 18 (in addition to Part 15) depends on its switching frequency and harmonic spectrum — this must be determined on a model-by-model basis with an FCC-recognized lab. If Part 18 applies, CN manufacturers have no existing equivalent certification pathway; a new US-specific emissions test and manufacturer verification record is required. CE ISM reports (EN 55011) are not substitutable. In practice, most standard CN grid-tied string inverters (16–200 kHz fundamental switching frequency) do not fall within Part 18 ISM bands; Part 18 risk arises mainly if the inverter includes a PLC-based communication module or AFCI function that intentionally generates energy at ISM-band frequencies.
gap.zh: 适用性差距：特定光伏逆变器型号是否须额外遵守第18部分（在第15部分之外），取决于其开关频率和谐波频谱，须由FCC认可实验室逐型号判定。若第18部分适用，中国制造商现无等效认证路径，须进行新的美国专项发射测试并保存制造商验证记录。CE ISM报告（EN 55011）不可替代。实际上，大多数标准中国并网组串式逆变器（基波开关频率16–200 kHz）不落入第18部分ISM频段；若逆变器含有在ISM频段有意产生能量的PLC通信模块或AFCI功能，则第18部分风险才会产生。
gap.zht: 適用性差距：特定光伏逆變器型號是否須額外遵守第18部分（在第15部分之外），取決於其開關頻率和諧波頻譜，須由FCC認可實驗室逐型號判定。若第18部分適用，中國製造商現無等效認證路徑，須進行新的美國專項發射測試並保存製造商驗證記錄。CE ISM報告（EN 55011）不可替代。實際上，大多數標準中國並網組串式逆變器（基波開關頻率16–200 kHz）不落入第18部分ISM頻段；若逆變器含有在ISM頻段有意產生能量的PLC通訊模組或AFCI功能，則第18部分風險才會產生。

mandatory_status.target: Conditionally mandatory — applies only if the inverter's operating frequency or significant harmonics fall within designated ISM bands; must be assessed per model
mandatory_status.cn: No direct equivalent mandatory requirement for export; domestic compliance via GB/T 17799 series

source.publisher: FCC / US Government Publishing Office (eCFR Title 47)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Conditional gap: Manufacturers must confirm with an FCC-recognized lab whether Part 18 applies to their specific inverter model based on switching frequency and harmonic profile. If applicable, new US-specific testing and a manufacturer verification record are required; existing CN/CE ISM test data cannot be reused.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 条件性差距：制造商须与FCC认可实验室确认第18部分是否适用于其特定逆变器型号（依据开关频率和谐波特性）。若适用，须进行新的美国专项测试并保存制造商验证记录；现有中国/CE ISM测试数据不可复用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 條件性差距：製造商須與FCC認可實驗室確認第18部分是否適用於其特定逆變器型號（依據開關頻率和諧波特性）。若適用，須進行新的美國專項測試並保存製造商驗證記錄；現有中國/CE ISM測試數據不可復用。

requirement_topic.en: FCC Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) — Documentation & Labeling
requirement_topic.zh: FCC供应商合规声明（SDoC）— 文件与标签要求
requirement_topic.zht: FCC供應商合規聲明（SDoC）— 文件與標籤要求

summary.en: Devices subject to FCC Part 15 Subpart B (and Part 18 where applicable) must be accompanied by a Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC). The SDoC must: (1) identify the responsible party (must be located in the US or have a designated US agent); (2) reference the applicable FCC rules; (3) be supported by test records retained for 2 years after the last date of manufacture. The device must bear an FCC compliance label per 47 CFR §15.19; for devices where labeling is impractical, FCC KDB 784748 D01 (General Labeling and Notification, v09r02) and D02 (e-Labeling, v02r01) provide alternative label placement and electronic label guidance. For inverters with remote/app-based interfaces, KDB 784748 D02 electronic labeling provisions may apply — the label may be displayed on the management interface or in the companion app. The user manual must include FCC Part 15 interference notice language per §15.105. No FCC filing or pre-approval is required for SDoC devices.
summary.zh: 须遵守FCC第15部分B子部分（及适用时第18部分）的设备须附有供应商合规声明（SDoC）。SDoC须：（1）注明责任方（须位于美国或指定美国代理人）；（2）引用适用的FCC规则；（3）由保存至最后生产日期后2年的测试记录支持。设备须按47 CFR §15.19标注FCC合规标签；对于标签空间受限的设备，FCC KDB 784748 D01（通用标签与通知，v09r02）和D02（电子标签，v02r01）提供替代标签位置和电子标签指导。具有远程/App管理界面的逆变器可适用KDB 784748 D02电子标签规定，标签可显示于管理界面或配套应用程序中。用户手册须按§15.105包含FCC第15部分干扰声明语言。SDoC设备无需向FCC提交备案或获得预先批准。
summary.zht: 須遵守FCC第15部分B子部分（及適用時第18部分）的設備須附有供應商合規聲明（SDoC）。SDoC須：（1）注明責任方（須位於美國或指定美國代理人）；（2）引用適用的FCC規則；（3）由保存至最後生產日期後2年的測試記錄支持。設備須按47 CFR §15.19標注FCC合規標籤；對於標籤空間受限的設備，FCC KDB 784748 D01（通用標籤與通知，v09r02）和D02（電子標籤，v02r01）提供替代標籤位置和電子標籤指引。具有遠端/App管理介面的逆變器可適用KDB 784748 D02電子標籤規定，標籤可顯示於管理介面或配套應用程式中。用戶手冊須按§15.105包含FCC第15部分干擾聲明語言。SDoC設備無需向FCC提交備案或獲得預先批准。

standards_or_laws: 47 CFR §15.19 (labeling requirements)
47 CFR §15.105 (information to user)
47 CFR §2.1077 (SDoC content requirements)
47 CFR §2.1074 (responsible party for SDoC)
FCC KDB 784748 D01 (General Labeling and Notification, v09r02) — confirmed active on FCC KDB portal
FCC KDB 784748 D02 (Electronic Labeling, v02r01) — confirmed active on FCC KDB portal
FCC KDB 896810 (Supplier's Declaration of Conformity — SDoC guidance) — confirmed active on FCC KDB portal

summary.en: CN manufacturers exporting under CE marking issue a EU Declaration of Conformity (DoC) referencing EN standards, with CE mark affixed to the product. For domestic China market, CCC (China Compulsory Certification) or SRRC (radio) certificates are issued by designated certification bodies; manufacturers do not self-declare in the same way. The CE DoC format, responsible party structure, and label requirements are materially different from FCC SDoC — no direct reuse is possible. There is no CN domestic equivalent to the FCC 'responsible party in the US' requirement.
summary.zh: 中国制造商以CE标志出口时，须签发引用EN标准的欧盟符合性声明（DoC），并在产品上加贴CE标志。中国国内市场则由指定认证机构颁发CCC（强制性产品认证）或SRRC（无线电）证书，制造商不以同等方式自我声明。CE DoC格式、责任方结构及标签要求与FCC SDoC存在实质性差异，不可直接复用。中国国内认证体系中无对应FCC「美国境内责任方」的要求。
summary.zht: 中國製造商以CE標誌出口時，須簽發引用EN標準的歐盟符合性聲明（DoC），並在產品上加貼CE標誌。中國國內市場則由指定認證機構頒發CCC（強制性產品認證）或SRRC（無線電）證書，製造商不以同等方式自我聲明。CE DoC格式、責任方結構及標籤要求與FCC SDoC存在實質性差異，不可直接復用。中國國內認證體系中無對應FCC「美國境內責任方」的要求。

standards_or_laws: EU Declaration of Conformity (CE marking — EU framework, not FCC-accepted)
GB/T 30250 (product EMC marking — domestic China voluntary marking standard; not applicable to US FCC SDoC requirements; cited for completeness only)
CCC certification scheme (CNCA — compulsory, domestic China only)

gap.en: Documentation gap: The FCC SDoC is a US-specific self-declaration with unique format, content, responsible-party, and labeling requirements. CN manufacturers must: (a) appoint a US responsible party (importer, US subsidiary, or authorized representative); (b) create a US-format SDoC referencing 47 CFR Part 15; (c) update product labels and user manuals with FCC-specific language; (d) retain test records for 2 years. No element of the CE DoC, CCC certificate, or GB test report fulfills these requirements. This is an administrative gap that adds time and cost independent of the underlying EMC test results.
gap.zh: 文件差距：FCC SDoC是具有独特格式、内容、责任方及标签要求的美国专项自我声明。中国制造商须：（a）指定美国责任方（进口商、美国子公司或授权代表）；（b）按47 CFR第15部分格式创建美式SDoC；（c）更新产品标签和用户手册，加入FCC专项语言；（d）保存测试记录2年。CE DoC、CCC证书或GB测试报告中的任何内容均不能满足上述要求。这是一项独立于EMC测试结果的行政性差距，将增加时间和成本。
gap.zht: 文件差距：FCC SDoC是具有獨特格式、內容、責任方及標籤要求的美國專項自我聲明。中國製造商須：（a）指定美國責任方（進口商、美國子公司或授權代表）；（b）按47 CFR第15部分格式創建美式SDoC；（c）更新產品標籤和用戶手冊，加入FCC專項語言；（d）保存測試記錄2年。CE DoC、CCC證書或GB測試報告中的任何內容均不能滿足上述要求。這是一項獨立於EMC測試結果的行政性差距，將增加時間和成本。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SDoC with US responsible party, compliant labeling, and user manual FCC notice are all required before US import/sale
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — CE DoC and CCC are domestic/EU market requirements; no CN export requirement for FCC SDoC

source.publisher: FCC / US Government Publishing Office (eCFR Title 47, Part 2 Subpart J — Equipment Authorization)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gap requires action: CN manufacturers must create a new FCC SDoC, appoint a US responsible party, and update product labeling and user manuals before US market entry. This is a mandatory administrative requirement independent of EMC test results; no existing CN or CE documentation satisfies it.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 存在差距，需采取行动：中国制造商在进入美国市场前须创建新的FCC SDoC、指定美国责任方，并更新产品标签和用户手册。这是独立于EMC测试结果的强制性行政要求，现有中国或CE文件均不满足该要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 存在差距，需採取行動：中國製造商在進入美國市場前須創建新的FCC SDoC、指定美國責任方，並更新產品標籤和用戶手冊。這是獨立於EMC測試結果的強制性行政要求，現有中國或CE文件均不滿足該要求。
